title: Local RAG: Prompt boost with grounded snippets
description: Show how to turn a vague request into a grounded, higher-quality prompt using Local RAG results.
preconditions: Local RAG indexing completed for KitchenSink

steps.message: Topic: Baseline prompt vs grounded prompt. Type continue to move the UI to Local RAG.
Topic: Baseline prompt (vague). Type continue to show it.
State the goal: faster codebase lookup and better prompts. Type continue to proceed.

steps.template: Improved prompt: "Using the snippets below, explain how `LocalRAGEmbeddings` chooses the embedding provider, how Core ML assets are detected, and what warnings are shown in the dashboard. Provide file paths and brief bullets."

arguments.prompt: Using the snippets below, explain how Local RAG selects the embedding provider and how the UI warns about missing assets. Provide file paths and short bullets.
